rationale: Both reach the same correct diagnosis matching the ground truth (regression from #4527, fix in #4792, already folded into the 0.24 rebase commit a560ed18) and cite the same real files/lines/snippet verbatim. X delivers a clean, complete maintainer-style close-out with a clear verdict, workaround, and preemption of red herrings. Y is delivered as raw agent scaffolding (duplicated draft_answer blocks, exposed internal diagnostics) and its final answer is literally cut off mid-sentence ('Set async_chu'), which is a real completeness defect for a response meant to be posted to the reporter.
